summary: Completed testing of AdminPartnerOpsPanel and partner progress API endpoints. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed AdminPartnerOpsPanel visibility in admin partner view with all required features working.

issues: Shows 'Partner di anteprima' message for demo partner Marco Ferretti (id 1) since it's not in DB - this is expected behavior
